//: Typechecks the WEB CLIENT (web/src + web/fk + vendored core). Separate from the root tsconfig because the vendored core is written for bun's looser type-import rules, so this config turns OFF verbatimModuleSyntax (the root keeps it on for worker/shared). Run: bun run typecheck:web. This is what catches client-only mistakes like an unimported UI helper — the root tsconfig never sees web/src.
